action.reasoning: Observation: Best Z500 RMSE = 460.9 (iter 8, base_ch=128, in_channels=6, dropout=0.25, 4-shift TTA). Iter 11 with in_channels=8 (time derivative) got 469.1 val RMSE - time derivative hurt performance. Only ~22 min remaining. Analysis: The time derivative was not helpful. Need to revert to in_channels=6 (proven best) and try to improve further: 1) Increase TTA from 4 to 8 shifts for better prediction averaging, 2) Increase z500_weight to 4.0 since primary metric is rmse_z500, 3) Keep dropout=0.25 and base_ch=128 (best config). Decision: Retrain with in_channels=6, base_ch=128, dropout=0.25, z500_weight=4.0, max 15 epochs, and submit for eval. 8-shift TTA should reduce prediction variance and potentially beat 460.9.
